with.description: Create a new inner scope with temporary variables.
with.caveat: Variables defined inside the with block do not exist outside it. Outer variables with the same name are temporarily shadowed.

if.syntax: {% if condition %}...{% elif condition %}...{% else %}...{% endif %}
if.description: Conditionally render blocks based on the truth value of expressions.
if.caveat: Conditions follow Python truthiness rules: empty sequences, empty strings, None, and 0 evaluate to False.

for.syntax: {% for target in iterable %}...{% else %}...{% endfor %}
for.description: Iterate over an iterable (such as a list, tuple, or dict) and render the block for each item.
for.caveat: Loop variables are only available inside the loop body.
